name: Validate Version Bump
description: When a .csproj is edited, checks that the Version follows semver format and that the same version is also updated in Directory.Packages.props (CPM consistency).

then.prompt:
A .csproj file was just saved. Please do the following checks:

1. Read the saved .csproj file and extract the <Version> value.
2. Verify the version follows semver format (X.Y.Z or X.Y.Z-prerelease). If it doesn't, warn the user.
3. Read Directory.Packages.props and check whether a <PackageVersion Include="<PackageId>" Version="..."> entry exists for this package.
4. If the entry exists but the version doesn't match the .csproj version, alert the user with the exact fix needed: update Directory.Packages.props to match.
5. If everything is consistent, confirm silently with a one-line message.

Do NOT make any changes automatically — only report findings.
